figures.caption: Figure 1: The Prometheus Framework. Phase 1: The Architect (Gemini-3.0-Pro) performs root cause analysis and synthesizes a Gherkin specification S. Phase 2: The Engineer validates S through Sandwich Verification—S must fail on Cbuggy and pass on Cfixed (or human review in production). If verification fails, S is regenerated. Phase 3: The Fixer (Qwen-3.0-Coder) performs a specification-guided surgical repair, producing patch P .

Table 1: Performance Comparison: Blind Fixer vs. Prometheus (Enlightened). The Blind column shows Qwen-3.0-Coder without specification guidance. Enl. Rescue shows bugs fixed by adding BDD specification guidance. Total = Blind Success + Enl. Rescue.
